out_of_scope_note: Personal opinion/commentary piece on the state of consciousness science (OSF preprint). No empirical content, no computational model, no neural data — a reflective essay arguing that conflation of subjective experience with general cognitive/perceptual processes plus media-driven incentive structures are damaging the field. Falls under the 'philosophy of consciousness / opinion piece without empirical content' OOS category — the lab tracks empirical computational neuroscience, not philosophy-of-science commentary.
